item.title: Camp Food in North Carolina’s Forests
item.description: A camping food challenge set deep in North Carolina’s forests, focused on camp meals and the outdoor experience.

media:content.media:title: Camp Food in North Carolina’s Forests
media:content.media:description: A camping food challenge set deep in North Carolina’s forests, focused on camp meals and the outdoor experience.

item.title: Insane Burger Challenge
item.description: A fun burger challenge featuring a huge portion and plenty of flavor. Perfect for fans of outdoor-style food challenges and hearty meals.

media:content.media:title: Insane Burger Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fun burger challenge featuring a huge portion and plenty of flavor. Perfect for fans of outdoor-style food challenges and hearty meals.

item.title: Big Burger Challenge: 4 Burgers in 10 Minutes
item.description: A fun burger challenge featuring 4 burgers in 10 minutes, with a focus on flavor, portion size, and the challenge experience.

media:content.media:title: Big Burger Challenge: 4 Burgers in 10 Minutes
media:content.media:description: A fun burger challenge featuring 4 burgers in 10 minutes, with a focus on flavor, portion size, and the challenge experience.

item.title: How Fast Can You Eat a Footlong at Sonic?
item.description: A fun footlong challenge at Sonic, focused on speed, flavor, and the excitement of seeing how quickly it can be finished.

media:content.media:title: How Fast Can You Eat a Footlong at Sonic?
media:content.media:description: A fun footlong challenge at Sonic, focused on speed, flavor, and the excitement of seeing how quickly it can be finished.

item.title: Can I Finish the BBQ Challenge?
item.description: A fun BBQ challenge at Smoked to the Bone, with a big portion and plenty of flavor. Can the undefeated challenge be finished?

media:content.media:title: Can I Finish the BBQ Challenge?
media:content.media:description: A fun BBQ challenge at Smoked to the Bone, with a big portion and plenty of flavor. Can the undefeated challenge be finished?

item.title: Nature, Fire, and Food
item.description: A simple outdoor food moment with nature and fire at the center.

media:content.media:description: A simple outdoor food moment with nature and fire at the center.

item.title: Eating Tons of Hot Dogs for Charity
item.description: A fun hot dog challenge for charity, featuring plenty of hot dogs and a lighthearted competitive eating vibe.

media:content.media:title: Eating Tons of Hot Dogs for Charity
media:content.media:description: A fun hot dog challenge for charity, featuring plenty of hot dogs and a lighthearted competitive eating vibe.
